prompt: In this spot, choose the best action from the cues.
why_v1: Choose the action that matches your track plan and current pressure.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits the cue set, so the line keeps the controlled continue this spot is actually rewarding.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Calling works better because cash pressure still lets you realize equity without bloating the pot before you own a clear value or fold-equity edge.
